name: Spring Roll-Ups
recipeIngredient: 500 milliliters fiddleheads, cooked until tender (well drained)
4 chicken breasts without skin, boned and pounded
recipeInstructions:
1. Place about 20 fiddleheads on each chicken breast, roll and secure with toothpicks.
2. Combine flour, paprika, thyme, salt, and pepper; mix well and set aside.
3. In a small bowl, beat egg with milk.
4. Dip chicken breasts in egg mixture, then roll in the flour mixture.
5. Heat butter in a skillet and brown the chicken rolls until golden.
6. Transfer chicken rolls to a 3 L rectangular pan.
7. Sprinkle bacon pieces over the rolls.
8. Heat oil in a skillet and stir-fry onion, garlic, mushrooms, and tomatoes for 2 minutes.
9. Add sherry; simmer for 2 more minutes.
10. Combine cornstarch with chicken broth and add to the pan, stirring constantly until coated with a light, clear glaze.
11. Pour the entire contents of the pan over the chicken rolls.
12. Cover loosely with foil.
13. Bake in an oven set to 180°C for 30 minutes, basting occasionally with juices from the bottom of the pan.
14. Cover and bake for an additional 15 minutes or until the chicken is tender.
